title: Hugging Face Training Details Module
description: Derived from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/huggingface/huggingface_hub/refs/heads/main/src/huggingface_hub/templates/modelcard_template.md, heading '## Training Details'. This is a non-optional section in the original template, with child subsections flattened for Synapse compatibility.
